{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Categories}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Ave Maria
|class_id=22551
|rank=AA
|affct=FTH
|birthday=12-26
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.12%)
|description=On Dec 26, 1545 AD, Caccini completed the famous Ave Maria.<br>The Ave Maria is a vocal piece by composer Giulio Caccini, set in the background of Johann Sebastian Bach's Prelude in C major. It is a soprano aria with a wide vocal range and lyrics from a Catholic prayer to the Virgin Mary. Caccini's skillful combination of melody and lyrics creates a pure and lofty atmosphere, making it a classic of religious music.
|fame=36
|art=45
|fth=69
|civ=33
|tech=45
|ss1=Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 2%<br>Merge 1 Purple Stardust: Gain 1 more by 2%
|ss2=Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 3%<br>Merge 1 Purple Stardust: Gain 1 more by 3%
|ss3=Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 4%<br>Merge 1 Purple Stardust: Gain 1 more by 4%
|ss4=Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 6%<br>Merge 1 Purple Stardust: Gain 1 more by 6%
|ss5=Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 8%<br>Merge 1 Purple Stardust: Gain 1 more by 8%
|ss7=Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 8%<br>Merge 1 Purple Stardust: Gain 1 more by 8%<br>Merge 1 Blue Stardust: Gain 1 more by 7% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Goldfish skill II.png|50px]]Place in Goldfish Biozilla: In Species War, Troop Fire RES +30
|skill2=[[File:Biozilla skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: This Relic's FTH +10
}}
